name: @trembus-demo/soul-steel
description: Soul Steel — a multi-page demo SITE consuming @trembus/{ui,viz,game-viz} via their published API (workspace:* + ./styles.css). NOT a library: no 3-jobs contract, not in the `pnpm validate` gate. Scripts are named off the gated set (dev/build:site/preview/tc) so `pnpm -r` skips it; run the dog-food check with `pnpm demos:check` from the repo root.
